values.content:
=You are an expert English language checker analyzing text extracted from an image via OCR.

Analyze the following OCR text for errors and return ONLY a valid JSON object (no markdown, no explanations, no preamble).

OCR Text:
{{ $json.results[0].entities[0].objects[0].entities[0].text }}

Return this EXACT JSON structure:
{
  "errors_detected": [
    {
      "error_type": "spelling|grammar|punctuation|spacing|consistency",
      "original_text": "exact text with error",
      "corrected_text": "corrected version",
      "location": "approximate location in text",
      "severity": "high|medium|low",
      "explanation": "brief explanation of the error"
    }
  ],
  "summary": {
    "total_errors": 0,
    "spelling_errors": 0,
    "grammar_errors": 0,
    "punctuation_errors": 0,
    "spacing_errors": 0,
    "consistency_errors": 0
  },
  "image_metadata": {
    "total_text_blocks": 1,
    "text_quality": "high|medium|low"
  }
}

Rules:
- Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown code blocks
- Include all error types: spelling, grammar, punctuation, spacing, consistency
- Be thorough but accurate
- If no errors found, return empty errors_detected array
- Focus on real English language errors, not OCR artifacts
